creator: citrin+pr@citrin.ru
text:
On 10.3 it fails to build with error:

/wrkdirs/usr/ports/textproc/sdcv/work/sdcv-0.5.1/src/libwrapper.cpp:325:9: error: use of overloaded operator '[]' is ambiguous (with operand types 'glib::CharStr' (aka 'ResourceWrapper<gchar, void, g_free>') and 'int')                    
        if (str[0] == '\0')                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
            ~~~^~

I need to look at this.
